svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="pIXoe-Co4DbdBqvssCjp"> <mxGraphModel dx="2828" dy="1660" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "sequenceDiagram
 autonumber
 actor Client
 participant Gateway
 participant Cache as Cache / Storage
 participant Bank as Payment Processor (Simulated)

 Client->>Gateway: POST /process-payment {amount, currency} <br/> [Header: Idempotency-Key]
 Gateway->>Cache: Look up Idempotency-Key
 
 alt Key Not Found (First Request)
 Gateway->>Cache: Save Key with state: \"IN_PROGRESS\" & Request Body Hash
 Gateway->>Bank: Simulate payment processing (2-second delay)
 Bank-->>Gateway: Charge successful
 Gateway->>Cache: Update Key state: \"COMPLETED\", store Response Body/Status
 Gateway-->>Client: 200 OK (Charged GHS)
 
 alt Key Found & State is \"COMPLETED\"
 Cache-->>Gateway: Return saved Response Body/Status
 Gateway-->>Client: 200 OK (Charged GHS) + [Header: X-Cache-Hit: true]
 
 alt Key Found & State is \"IN_PROGRESS\" (In-Flight Check / Race Condition)
 Note over Gateway: Wait (block) until the active transaction completes
 Gateway-->>Client: 200 OK (Charged GHS) + [Header: X-Cache-Hit: true]
 
 alt Key Found but Request Body Mismatches (Fraud Check)
 Cache-->>Gateway: Body mismatch detected
 Gateway-->>Client: 422 Unprocessable Entity
 end
",
 "config": null
}" id="EoYrKjHtqygwxK1OdhD5-1"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=20;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
